## Meeting Purpose

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [257 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Focus areas: productivity techniques, document data extraction, e-commerce use cases](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Some volatility in local report metrics (clicks/impressions); team monitoring for seasonal vs. trend patterns](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Webinar Planning: AI-Assisted Image Selection

  - [Miles presented low-fi prototype in Datagrid for AI-assisted article image selection](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Import articles into spreadsheet view](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [AI agent analyzes content, suggests relevant image passages](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Multiple image options provided per passage](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [User reviews/approves selections](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Final output in blog-friendly format](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential enhancements:](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Dynamic column generation based on article structure](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Integration with Webflow for draft uploads (to be explored)](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [Quality control checks using existing AI scoring capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/uRBkYpr-qGoNAkK1exxTQyn9yR-g4DhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
